assertions.title: Create Keyset Continue hands off to Generation Progress

evidence.consoleErrors: not required for this assertion (no page errors observed during this flow)

assertions.title: Full Create → Shared happy path

steps.action: Fill Password and Confirm Password on /create/profile and click Continue
steps.observed: Stayed on /create/profile; page displayed error text: 'invalid input: Invalid group package: invalid byte length: expected 33, got 19'

assertions.issues: Flow did not progress beyond /create/profile, so stepper progression to /create/distribute and /create/complete could not be validated.

assertions.title: Shared Create Profile Continue advances to Distribute Shares

steps.action: Open /demo/shared-create-profile and click 'Continue to Distribute Shares'
steps.expected: Navigate to /create/distribute with shared stepper at step 3 active
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/create/distribute; destination screenshot shows Distribute Shares screen with step 3 active and steps 1-2 completed

assertions.title: Shared Distribute Shares locked share gate

steps.expected: Share 3 shows 'Enter password to unlock' with disabled Copy/QR; Share 2 Copy/QR enabled
steps.observed: Body text includes 'Enter password to unlock' under Share 3; interactive state checks returned Share2 Copy=true, Share2 QR=true, Share3 Copy=false, Share3 QR=false

evidence.consoleErrors: not required for this assertion (no page errors observed)

assertions.title: Distribution Completion exits shared flow to dashboard

steps.expected: Exit to /dashboard/{profileId} with no console errors
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/dashboard/demo-profile; no console/page errors reported

frictions.description: On /create/profile during VAL-CRT-012, continuing the flow required manual password entry and still surfaced an inline package-validation error that prevented navigation.
frictions.resolution: Attempted password + confirm fill and retry; flow remained blocked at /create/profile.

summary: Retested 5 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-CRT-007, VAL-SHR-005, VAL-SHR-008, VAL-SHR-011) and 1 failed (VAL-CRT-012 blocked in-flow at /create/profile due invalid group package error).
